# QA Plan: Sprint 002 — Feature Layer MVP Systems

**Date**: 2026-06-04
**Generated by**: /qa-plan sprint
**Scope**: 5 Feature MVP systems + 4 infrastructure tasks (Sprint 002)
**Engine**: Godot 4.6 (GDScript)
**Sprint File**: `production/sprints/sprint-002.md`
**Sprint Status**: `production/sprint-status.yaml`

> **Note**: Feature layer story files do not yet exist — they will be created via
> S002-I03 (`/create-epics layer:feature` + `/create-stories` × 5). This QA plan
> specifies test requirements at the system level, derived directly from GDD
> Acceptance Criteria, Formulas, and Edge Cases sections. Story-level QA Test Cases
> will be back-filled into story files during `/create-stories`.

## Automated Tests Required

### S002-I04 — Physics Integration Tests (Logic)

**Test file**: `game/tests/integration/player_controller/test_pc_jump_integration.gd`
**System under test**: `game/scripts/core/player_controller.gd`
**GUT requirement**: Requires CharacterBody2D + floor collision + GUT InputSender

**What to test** (9 deferred tests from Sprint 001):

PC-002 — Jump System (6 tests):
- Ground jump: `velocity.y = -jump_impulse`, state → AIRBORNE
- Coyote time success: jump within 0.10s after leaving floor → velocity.y = -jump_impulse
- Coyote time expired: jump after 0.10s → jump blocked, `jump_buffer_timer` set
- Jump buffer fires on landing if pressed within 0.12s before
- Jump buffer silent if expired (no spurious jump)
- No double-jump: second airborne press fills buffer only (velocity.y unchanged)

PC-003 — Parry (3 tests):
- Parry entry from IDLE via real `Input.is_action_just_pressed(&'parry')` → state=PARRYING
- Same-frame parry+dodge priority: parry wins → state=PARRYING, `dodge_input_pressed` NOT emitted
- Jump blocked while PARRYING → state stays PARRYING, velocity.y unchanged

**Estimated test count**: 9 unit tests

---

### S002-F01 — BossStateMachine (Logic)

**Test file paths** (to be created after S002-I03): `game/tests/unit/boss_state_machine/`
**Suggested story breakdown**: ~5 stories
- story-001: skeleton + IDLE/TELEGRAPHING/ATTACKING transitions (AC-01, AC-03, AC-04, AC-09, AC-12)
- story-002: STAGGERED + sequence index formula (AC-02, AC-05, AC-07, AC-08)
- story-003: DEFEATED + same-frame priority (AC-06, AC-23, AC-24)
- story-004: phase transitions × 4 paths (AC-14, AC-15, AC-16, AC-17, AC-18)
- story-005: data validation + clamping + reset_for_retry (AC-19, AC-20, AC-21, AC-22)
**GDD reference**: `design/gdd/boss-state-machine.md`

**Key formulas to verify**:
- Formula 1: `next_index = (current_index + 1) mod N` — test boundary: N=1 (single-attack loop), N=3 last-element wrap
- Formula 2: `T_eff = telegraph_duration_override if > 0, else T_default[attack_type]` — test all 3 attack types; verify 0 override reads default; verify aframe clamp to 0.1s
- Code review AC: grep `boss-state-machine.gd` for literals `0.8`, `1.2`, `1.5` — must be zero matches

**Edge cases** (all from GDD Edge Cases section):
- `boss_phase_changed` received during TELEGRAPHING → completes telegraph first (AC-15)
- `boss_phase_changed` received during ATTACKING → completes animation first (AC-16)
- `boss_phase_changed` received during STAGGERED → waits for stagger_ended (AC-17)
- Second `boss_phase_changed` during PHASE_TRANSITION → first discarded, uses latest to_phase (AC-18)
- `boss_defeated` in any state → immediate DEFEATED (AC-06)
- Same frame: `stagger_ended` + `boss_defeated` → DEFEATED wins (AC-23)
- Empty attack_sequence (N=0) → error on load, refuse init (AC-20)
- `idle_duration_after_attack ≤ 0` → clamp to 0.1s + warning (AC-21)
- `telegraph_duration_override < 0.016s` → clamp to 0.1s + warning (AC-22)
- Missing animation asset → skip animation, continue logic, no crash (AC-19)

**Estimated test count**: ~24 unit tests
**Note**: AC-04/AC-16 (animation finished trigger) deferred until ADR confirms AnimationPlayer vs timer mechanism. Placeholder pending test with documented reason.

---

### S002-F03 — ParryTelegraphSystem (Logic)

**Test file paths**: `game/tests/unit/parry_system/`
**Suggested story breakdown**: ~5 stories
- story-001: IDLE/TELEGRAPHING state transitions + signal reception (AC-01, AC-02)
- story-002: parry success formula — window timing, boundary values (AC-03, AC-12, AC-14, AC-14b)
- story-003: parry fail path + apply_damage call (AC-04, AC-05, AC-11)
- story-004: edge cases + interruptions (AC-16, AC-17, AC-18, AC-19, AC-20)
- story-005: performance AC + data injection validation (AC-22, AC-23)
**GDD reference**: `design/gdd/parry-telegraph-system.md`

**Key formulas to verify**:
- Formula 1: Window timing — `window_open_time = telegraph_duration × window_open_fraction`
  - LIGHT: open=0.40s, close=0.70s (tolerance ±0.001s)
  - HEAVY: open=0.60s, close=0.95s (tolerance ±0.001s)
  - SWEEP: open=0.75s, close=1.20s (tolerance ±0.001s)
- Formula 2: Progress `telegraph_progress = telegraph_timer / telegraph_duration` — strict [0.0, 1.0]
- Formula 3: `parry_success = (TELEGRAPHING) AND (timer ≥ open) AND (timer ≤ close)` — closed interval on both bounds
- Code review AC: grep `parry_telegraph_system.gd` for literals `0.8`, `1.2`, `1.5`, `0.30`, `0.35`, `0.45`, `0.50` → zero matches

**Edge cases** (from GDD):
- Exact boundary values: `timer = window_open_time` → parry_success (AC-14)
- Exact boundary values: `timer = window_close_time` → parry_success (AC-14b)
- Same-frame: `telegraph_timer` would overflow AND `parry_input_pressed` in window → parry wins, no apply_damage (AC-20)
- `player_died` during TELEGRAPHING → IDLE, no apply_damage (AC-17)
- `boss_defeated` during TELEGRAPHING → IDLE, no apply_damage (AC-18)
- Second `attack_telegraphed` while TELEGRAPHING → discard second, warning log (AC-16)
- Apply_damage with amount=0.0 → still calls apply_damage once, emits parry_failed (AC-19)

**Estimated test count**: ~24 unit tests
**Performance AC**: `parry_input_pressed` → all output signals within ≤ 0.5ms (AC-22) — verify via Godot Profiler; pending in headless GUT

---

### S002-F04 — CounterAttackComboSystem (Logic)

**Test file paths**: `game/tests/unit/counter_attack_combo/`
**Suggested story breakdown**: ~5 stories
- story-001: IDLE/COUNTER_WINDOW_OPEN entry + first hit (AC-01, AC-02)
- story-002: 3-hit combo completion + full_combo_completed signal (AC-02b, AC-03)
- story-003: BONUS_STAGGER × 3 attack types + stagger_ended (AC-06, AC-06b, AC-06c)
- story-004: hit cooldown + window expiry + lifecycle interruptions (AC-04, AC-05, AC-07, AC-08, AC-09, AC-10, AC-11)
- story-005: data injection + config clamping + HUD signal broadcast (AC-12, AC-13, AC-14, AC-15, AC-16)
**GDD reference**: `design/gdd/counter-attack-combo.md`

**Key formulas to verify**:
- Formula 1: `hit_damage(n) = counter_base_damage × multiplier[n]`
  - n=1: 20 × 0.8 = 16.0 hp
  - n=2: 20 × 1.1 = 22.0 hp
  - n=3: 20 × 1.6 = 32.0 hp
  - Total 3-hit: 70.0 hp
- Formula 2: `bonus_stagger_duration = base_counter_window × bonus_ratio`
  - LIGHT: 1.0 × 0.5 = 0.5s bonus (1.5s total)
  - HEAVY: 1.5 × 0.5 = 0.75s bonus (2.25s total)
  - SWEEP: 2.0 × 0.5 = 1.0s bonus (3.0s total)
- Formula 3 feasibility: `3 × 0.25 + 0.08 = 0.83s ≤ 1.0s` (LIGHT window constraint — verify no regression)
- Config injection test: multiplier[1]=1.0, [2]=1.5, [3]=2.0 → damage 20, 30, 40 (AC-12)

**Edge cases** (from GDD):
- Second `parry_succeeded` during COUNTER_WINDOW_OPEN → discard, warning log (AC-09)
- Hit cooldown: input during cooldown ignored, cooldown correctly expires at hit_animation_duration (AC-04, AC-05)
- Window expires mid-combo (hit_count=1) → stagger_ended emitted, IDLE, no combo complete (AC-08)
- `boss_defeated` during window → IDLE, no stagger_ended (AC-10)
- `player_died` during window → IDLE, no stagger_ended (AC-11)
- `hit_animation_duration = 0.35s` → clamp to 0.30s + warning (AC-13)
- `bonus_ratio = 0.9` → clamp to 0.8 + warning (AC-14)
- `stagger_ended` is the SOLE emitter in this system: verify no other system calls `.emit()` on this signal (from ADR-0001)

**Estimated test count**: ~16 unit tests

---

### S002-F05 — InstantRetrySystem (Integration)

**Test file paths**: `game/tests/integration/instant_retry_system/`
**Suggested story breakdown**: ~5 stories
- story-001: player_died → DYING + SceneTree.paused=true (AC-01)
- story-002: death screen 4-phase sequence timing (AC-02) — pending (native timing)
- story-003: skip-at-any-frame → immediate RESUMING (AC-03) — pending (CONFLICT-01 skip guard)
- story-004: RetryContext data preservation (AC-04, AC-05)
- story-005: full reset — Boss HP + state machine + player spawn + retry invuln (AC-06, AC-07, AC-08)
**GDD reference**: `design/gdd/instant-retry-system.md`

**Key formulas to verify**:
- Formula 2: Death screen total = 0.2 + 0.4 + 0.6 + 0.3 = 1.5s (Art Bible 7.5 hard constraint)
  - Each phase tolerance: ±16.6ms (1 frame at 60fps)
  - AC-02 is pending until native build available (SceneTree.paused affects GUT timing)
- Formula 1: `retry_invuln_duration = RETRY_INVULN_BASE = 2.0s` — must be > `player_hit_invuln_duration = 0.5s`

**Edge cases** (from GDD):
- `player_died` during existing death screen → ignored (no re-trigger) (EC-01)
- Retry invuln absorbs all apply_damage(PLAYER, ...) calls (EC-02) — via HealthDamageSystem's INVULNERABLE guard
- Scene reset exceeds 1.5s → FAIL condition (EC-03) — verify reset stays < 100ms (ADR-0003 performance target)
- Simultaneous `player_died` + `boss_defeated` → boss_defeated wins, victory sequence (EC-06)
- Player pressing skip during RED_FLASH phase (0–200ms) → see CONFLICT-01 resolution for 200ms guard behavior

**Manual QA checklist items** (requires running the game):
- [ ] Death screen: 4 phases each visually distinct (RED_FLASH, FADE_TO_GREY, PHASE_SYMBOL, SYMBOL_FADE_OUT)
- [ ] Phase symbol (Boss's phase indicator) correctly displayed
- [ ] Skip: pressing any key during any phase → immediate resume (AC-03)
- [ ] No visual glitch between death and retry start
- [ ] Player spawns at full HP (no leftover HP from death)
- [ ] Boss HP matches the preserved value (verify via HUD)
- [ ] Retry invuln: Boss cannot deal damage within first 2.0s of retry

**Estimated test count**: ~8 integration tests (2 additional pending: AC-02 timing, AC-03 skip guard pending CONFLICT-01 resolution)

---

### S002-F02 — HUDSystem (UI + Logic)

**Test file paths**:
- Logic tests: `game/tests/unit/hud_system/` — formula/signal tests (headless)
- Manual evidence: `production/qa/evidence/hud-walkthrough-2026-06.md`
**Suggested story breakdown**: ~4 stories
- story-001: Player HP segment display + segment formula (AC-HUD-01 through AC-HUD-05)
- story-002: Boss HP bar + phase dividers (AC-HUD-06 through AC-HUD-09)
- story-003: Telegraph progress bar (AC-HUD-10 through AC-HUD-14)
- story-004: Counter window display + cross-element stacking (AC-HUD-15 through AC-HUD-23)
**GDD reference**: `design/gdd/hud-system.md`

**Logic tests** (automatable — signal-driven state calculations):
- HP segment formula: `ceil(hp / hp_per_segment)` — test boundary: HP=60/100→3, HP=1→1+flicker, HP=20→1 no flicker, HP=0→0 (AC-HUD-01 through AC-HUD-05)
- Boss HP fill ratio: `clamp(boss_current / boss_max, 0, 1)` — test: HP=750/1000→0.75, boss_max=0→warning+no crash (AC-HUD-06, AC-HUD-07)
- Telegraph bar clamp: progress=1.5 → clamp to 1.0 (AC-HUD-14)
- Counter window time_remaining: strictly decreasing in [0, base_counter_window] (AC-HUD-15)

**Manual QA checklist** (all require running Godot; UI story — ADVISORY gate):
- [ ] AC-HUD-02: HP=1 segment flickers at 0.5 Hz (visual)
- [ ] AC-HUD-08: Phase dividers at correct 60% and 30% positions (visual)
- [ ] AC-HUD-09: Phase divider animation 0.5s duration (visual)
- [ ] AC-HUD-10: Telegraph bar invisible when no active telegraph (visual)
- [ ] AC-HUD-11/12/13: Telegraph bar color changes (PRE_WINDOW, WINDOW_OPEN, POST_WINDOW) (visual)
- [ ] AC-HUD-17: Counter window gold color in BONUS_STAGGER (visual)
- [ ] AC-HUD-18: "FULL COMBO" text appears and disappears after 0.5s (visual)
- [ ] AC-HUD-19: Counter window bar fades over 0.2s on close (visual)
- [ ] AC-HUD-21: HP flicker + telegraph window open simultaneously, no interference (visual)

**Sign-off required**: lead-programmer (logic) + developer-as-AD (visual fidelity)
**Evidence to capture**: screenshot of each AC-HUD visual state

**Estimated test count**: ~12 automatable + 9 manual

---

## Manual QA Checklist

### S002-I01/I02 — Infrastructure Resolutions (Config/Data)

**Verification method**: Code review only
- [ ] CONFLICT-01: ADR-0003 skip-guard and GDD AC-03 now state the same behavior
- [ ] GAP-02: `control-manifest.md` Open Items entry for GAP-02 shows CLOSED with chosen pattern

### S002-Q01 — External Playtest (Visual/Feel)

**Method**: 5-minute unguided play session with a person unfamiliar with the game
**Goal**: Validate "Read to Win" core fantasy — does the player read the Boss body, or the HUD bar?
**Sign-off required**: developer (records findings) + creative director (validates Pillar 1)
**Evidence**: `production/playtests/playtest-001-[date].md`

Checklist:
- [ ] Player performs first successful parry without verbal instruction
- [ ] Player demonstrates voluntary retry behavior (replays 3+ times without prompting)
- [ ] Player describes their reading source (Boss body vs HUD bar) — record verbatim
- [ ] Player successfully enters Phase 2 (reduces Boss below 60% HP threshold) OR explicitly describes difficulty
- [ ] No confusion loops observed (player stuck > 60 seconds without knowing what to do)

### S002-Q02 — BossDataLoader assert() Debug Run (Config/Data)

**Method**: Run in Godot Debug mode (non-headless) with test data that triggers each assert
**Sign-off**: lead-programmer
**Evidence**: `production/qa/evidence/bossdata-assert-debug-2026-06.md`

Checklist:
- [ ] Empty `boss_id` → assert() fires, execution stops
- [ ] `boss_max_hp = 0.0` → assert() fires
- [ ] Empty `phases` array → assert() fires
- [ ] Empty `attack_sequence` on any phase → assert() fires
- [ ] Non-descending `phase_threshold_pct` (e.g. [0.3, 0.6]) → assert() fires

### S002-Q03 — HitpauseManager Native Build Timing (Logic)

**Method**: Native Windows build with a logging test scene
**Sign-off**: lead-programmer
**Evidence**: `production/qa/evidence/hitpause-runtime-2026-06.md`

Checklist:
- [ ] `trigger_hitpause(0.060)` → `Engine.time_scale = 0.0` on call frame
- [ ] After 60ms ± 16.6ms → `Engine.time_scale` restored to 1.0
- [ ] `create_timer(0.060, true, false, true)` counts real-time at time_scale=0
- [ ] `SceneTree.paused = true` during hitpause → time_scale still restores when timer fires

## Smoke Test Scope

Critical paths to verify via `/smoke-check sprint` before QA hand-off:

1. `godot --headless --path game/ -s res://addons/gut/gut_cmdln.gd -gconfig res://.gutconfig.json` — 0 failures
2. CONFLICT-01 resolved: verify `docs/architecture/adr-0003-*.md` and `design/gdd/instant-retry-system.md` now consistent
3. BossStateMachine instantiates and processes correctly (IDLE → TELEGRAPHING → ATTACKING cycle completes)
4. ParryTelegraphSystem: HEAVY parry window [0.60s, 0.95s] produces correct parry_success values at boundaries
5. CounterAttackComboSystem: 3-hit combo produces damage 16+22+32=70 hp total
6. HUDSystem: `player_hp_changed(60, 100)` → 3 segments lit (automated test)
7. InstantRetrySystem: `player_died` signal received → all 5 system `reset_for_retry()` methods called (integration test)
8. No regressions in Foundation/Core tests (baseline: 307+ passing, 0 failing)

---

## Playtest Requirements

| System | Playtest Goal | Min Sessions | Target Player |
|---|---|---|---|
| Full loop (all 5 systems integrated) | Validate "Read to Win" — player reads Boss body, not HUD bar | 1 | Non-developer, unfamiliar with game |
| InstantRetrySystem | Confirm voluntary retry behavior — player replays without prompting | Same session as above | Same |

**Sign-off requirement**: Playtest notes must be written to `production/playtests/playtest-001-[date].md`.
If the session reveals the player reads the HUD bar (not Boss body), escalate to `/ux-design hud` revision before marking Production phase complete.

---

## Definition of Done — Sprint 002

A story is DONE when ALL of the following are true:

- [ ] All acceptance criteria verified — unit test passing OR documented manual evidence (screenshot, timing log, or playtest notes with sign-off)
- [ ] Test file exists at the specified path for all Logic stories (BossStateMachine, ParryTelegraphSystem, CounterAttackComboSystem) — **BLOCKING**
- [ ] Integration test file exists for InstantRetrySystem — **BLOCKING**
- [ ] HUD manual evidence document exists at `production/qa/evidence/hud-walkthrough-2026-06.md` — **ADVISORY**
- [ ] `test_pc_jump_integration.gd` passes (closes 9 pending Sprint 001 deferrals) — **BLOCKING**
- [ ] CONFLICT-01 and GAP-02 resolved and verified via code review — **BLOCKING**
- [ ] Smoke check PASSES: `/smoke-check sprint` — **BLOCKING**
- [ ] QA sign-off APPROVED or APPROVED WITH CONDITIONS: `/team-qa sprint` — **BLOCKING**
- [ ] No S1 or S2 bugs in delivered features
- [ ] All sprint commits use `feat(story-id): description` format (retrospective action item #2)
- [ ] Story files updated to `Status: Complete` via `/story-done`
